title: Limited static analysis evidence
claim: The system has limited static inspection for files and configuration, but it is not a general source-code static analysis or SAST tool.
claim_ko: 시스템은 파일과 설정에 대한 제한적 정적 점검을 지원하지만, 일반 소스코드 정적 분석 또는 SAST 도구는 아니다.

supported_static_inputs.coverage: Application TLS and crypto-related configuration files such as nginx, Apache, Postfix, PostgreSQL, JWKS, and properties files.
Certificate files under known application certificate paths.
Private key files under known host/application paths. The scanner extracts metadata only and marks referenced versus dormant keys.
PKCS#12, PFX, JKS, keystore, and metadata files under known host/application paths.
Package repository and image signing key files.
SSH authorized_keys and public key files.

presentation_guidance: Describe the current support as file and configuration inspection through Host Agent.
Do not claim parity with source-code SAST or full codebase crypto API discovery tools.
